options.content: ⬅ Portal Home  |  ⚠️ AWR Intelligence  |  🚨 SAR Anomaly Detection  |  🔗 AWR+SAR Correlation  |  📌 Navigation Hub

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time, cpu,
  usr_pct AS "%user", system_pct AS "%system",
  iowait_pct AS "%iowait", idle_pct AS "%idle"
FROM sar_cpu_stats
WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND cpu='all'
ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT AVG(iowait_pct) AS value FROM sar_cpu_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND cpu='all'

SELECT AVG(idle_pct) AS value FROM sar_cpu_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND cpu='all'

SELECT snap_time AS time,
  mem_used_mb AS "Used MB", mem_free_mb AS "Free MB",
  cached_mb AS "Cached MB", buffers_mb AS "Buffers MB"
FROM sar_memory_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time,
  mem_used_pct AS "%memused", commit_pct AS "%commit"
FROM sar_memory_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time, swap_used_mb AS "Swap Used MB" FROM sar_swap_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT AVG(swap_used_pct) AS value FROM sar_swap_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')

SELECT snap_time AS time, swap_free_mb AS "Swap Free MB" FROM sar_swap_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time,
  SUM(read_mb_per_sec) AS "Total Read MB/s",
  SUM(write_mb_per_sec) AS "Total Write MB/s"
FROM sar_disk_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') GROUP BY snap_time ORDER BY snap_time

panels.title: Disk I/O — Read MB/s + Write MB/s (all devices)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time, MAX(util_pct) AS "Max Device %util"
FROM sar_disk_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') GROUP BY snap_time ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time, iface,
  rxkb_per_sec AS "rxkB/s", txkb_per_sec AS "txkB/s"
FROM sar_network_stats
WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND iface != 'lo'
ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time, iface, ifutil_pct AS "%ifutil"
FROM sar_network_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND iface != 'lo'
ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time,
  runq_sz AS "Run Queue", blocked AS "Blocked"
FROM sar_loadavg_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time,
  ldavg_1 AS "ldavg-1", ldavg_5 AS "ldavg-5", ldavg_15 AS "ldavg-15"
FROM sar_loadavg_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time, cswch_per_sec AS "cswch/s" FROM sar_ctxswitch_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT snap_time AS time,
  fault_per_sec AS "Minor Faults/s", majflt_per_sec AS "MAJOR Faults/s"
FROM sar_paging_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') ORDER BY snap_time

SELECT AVG(vmeff_pct) AS value FROM sar_paging_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')

SELECT snap_time AS time, device, read_mb_per_sec AS "Read MB/s"
FROM sar_disk_stats
WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}'
  AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
  AND device IN (
      SELECT device FROM sar_disk_stats
      WHERE hostname = '${hostname}' AND '${hostname}' != ''
        AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
      GROUP BY device
      ORDER BY AVG(read_mb_per_sec) DESC NULLS LAST
      LIMIT 5
  )
ORDER BY snap_time, device

panels.title: Disk Throughput per Device — Read MB/s

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time, device, write_mb_per_sec AS "Write MB/s"
FROM sar_disk_stats
WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}'
  AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
  AND device IN (
      SELECT device FROM sar_disk_stats
      WHERE hostname = '${hostname}' AND '${hostname}' != ''
        AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
      GROUP BY device
      ORDER BY AVG(write_mb_per_sec) DESC NULLS LAST
      LIMIT 5
  )
ORDER BY snap_time, device

panels.title: Disk Throughput per Device — Write MB/s

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time, device, await_ms AS "Await (ms)"
FROM sar_disk_stats
WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}'
  AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
  AND device IN (
      SELECT device FROM sar_disk_stats
      WHERE hostname = '${hostname}' AND '${hostname}' != ''
        AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
      GROUP BY device
      ORDER BY AVG(await_ms) DESC NULLS LAST
      LIMIT 5
  )
ORDER BY snap_time, device

panels.title: Disk Await (ms) per Device — High = Slow / Saturated Disk

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time, device, util_pct AS "%util"
FROM sar_disk_stats
WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}'
  AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
  AND device IN (
      SELECT device FROM sar_disk_stats
      WHERE hostname = '${hostname}' AND '${hostname}' != ''
        AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
      GROUP BY device
      ORDER BY AVG(util_pct) DESC NULLS LAST
      LIMIT 5
  )
ORDER BY snap_time, device

panels.title: Disk %util per Device — High = I/O Bottleneck

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time, device, tps AS "TPS"
FROM sar_disk_stats
WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}'
  AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
  AND device IN (
      SELECT device FROM sar_disk_stats
      WHERE hostname = '${hostname}' AND '${hostname}' != ''
        AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
      GROUP BY device
      ORDER BY AVG(tps) DESC NULLS LAST
      LIMIT 5
  )
ORDER BY snap_time, device

SELECT
    device                                  AS "Device",
    ROUND(AVG(tps)::numeric, 1)             AS "Avg TPS",
    ROUND(AVG(read_mb_per_sec)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg Read MB/s",
    ROUND(AVG(write_mb_per_sec)::numeric,2) AS "Avg Write MB/s",
    ROUND(AVG(await_ms)::numeric, 2)        AS "Avg Await (ms)",
    ROUND(AVG(svctm_ms)::numeric, 2)        AS "Avg SvcTm (ms)",
    ROUND(AVG(util_pct)::numeric, 1)        AS "Avg %util",
    ROUND(MAX(util_pct)::numeric, 1)        AS "Peak %util",
    ROUND(MAX(await_ms)::numeric, 2)        AS "Peak Await (ms)",
    CASE
        WHEN AVG(util_pct) >= 85 THEN '🔴 SATURATED'
        WHEN AVG(util_pct) >= 60 THEN '🟠 HIGH'
        WHEN AVG(await_ms) >= 50 THEN '🟡 SLOW'
        ELSE '🟢 OK'
    END                                     AS "Status"
FROM sar_disk_stats
WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}'
  AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
GROUP BY device
ORDER BY AVG(util_pct) DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Disks by I/O — Summary (avg over selected period)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(hugused_pct)::numeric,1) AS value FROM sar_hugepage_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')

SELECT ROUND((AVG(kbhugfree)/1024)::numeric,0) AS value FROM sar_hugepage_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')

SELECT ROUND((AVG(kbhugused)/1024/1024)::numeric,1) AS value FROM sar_hugepage_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')

SELECT kbhugfree AS "Free KB", kbhugused/1024 AS "Used MB" FROM sar_hugepage_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') ORDER BY snap_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT snap_time AS time,
  ROUND((kbhugused/1024)::numeric,0) AS "Used MB",
  ROUND((kbhugfree/1024)::numeric,0)  AS "Free MB"
FROM sar_hugepage_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
ORDER BY snap_time

panels.title: HugePages Trend — Used MB vs Free MB

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time, hugused_pct AS "HugePages Used %"
FROM sar_hugepage_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
ORDER BY snap_time

panels.title: HugePages Used % — Alert if consistently < 0.1% free
🔌 Socket Stats — Connection Activity & Session Bursts

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time,
  totsck AS "Total Sockets",
  tcpsck AS "TCP Sockets",
  udpsck AS "UDP Sockets"
FROM sar_socket_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
ORDER BY snap_time

panels.title: Total Sockets vs TCP Sockets — Sudden rise = session burst

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time, tcp_tw AS "TCP TIME_WAIT"
FROM sar_socket_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
ORDER BY snap_time

panels.title: TCP TIME_WAIT Connections — Spike = App Server Connection Storm

targets.rawSql:
SELECT snap_time AS time,
  totsck                                   AS "Total Sockets",
  tcp_tw                                   AS "TIME_WAIT",
  totsck - tcpsck - udpsck                 AS "Other Sockets",
  ROUND((tcp_tw::numeric/NULLIF(tcpsck,0)*100),1) AS "TIME_WAIT % of TCP"
FROM sar_socket_stats WHERE '${hostname}' != '' AND hostname = '${hostname}' AND snap_time::date BETWEEN to_date('${from_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY') AND to_date('${to_date}','DD-Mon-YYYY')
ORDER BY snap_time

panels.title: Connection Health — Total Sockets + TIME_WAIT Correlation

list.label: Hostname
list.name: hostname
list.query: SELECT value, label FROM (  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label  UNION ALL  SELECT DISTINCT hostname AS value, hostname AS label FROM sar_cpu_stats) AS t ORDER BY value;

list.label: From Date
list.name: from_date
list.query: SELECT value, label FROM (  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label  UNION ALL  SELECT DISTINCT    to_char(snap_time::date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') AS value,    to_char(snap_time::date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') AS label  FROM sar_cpu_stats WHERE hostname='${hostname}' AND cpu='all') AS t ORDER BY value ASC;

list.label: To Date
list.name: to_date
list.query: SELECT value, label FROM (  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label  UNION ALL  SELECT DISTINCT    to_char(snap_time::date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') AS value,    to_char(snap_time::date,'DD-Mon-YYYY') AS label  FROM sar_cpu_stats WHERE hostname='${hostname}' AND cpu='all') AS t ORDER BY value ASC;
